articles.title: Shreyas confirmed as India's T20I captain; Suryakumar dropped
articles.description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has been picked in an India squad for the first time

articles.title: Yashasvi Jaiswal replaces injured Virat Kohli for Afghanistan ODIs
articles.description: The India batter injured his hamstring during RCB's run to the IPL 2026 title

articles.title: India make red-ball switch for Afghanistan challenge in New Chandigarh's maiden Test
articles.description: India will have to decide between Harsh Dubey and Manav Suthar for the third spinner's spot

articles.title: ILT20 teams concerned over new rules mandating Afghanistan, Ireland player recruitment
articles.description: From the 2026 season, the league has stipulated that all squads will need to include at least four Afghanistan players and one from Ireland

articles.title: Cricket Canada draws up 'comprehensive' plan in bid to overturn ICC suspension
articles.description: Cricket Canada's COO told ESPNcricinfo that the new board is keen to implement corrective and preventive reforms

articles.title: Nepal, Malaysia, Hong Kong, Oman qualify for Asian Games men's cricket competition
articles.description: The four teams will join Afghanistan, Bangladesh, India, Pakistan, Sri Lanka and Japan in the ten-team competition starting September 24

articles.title: Shaun Tait resigns as Bangladesh fast bowling coach
articles.description: After 12 months in the role, he is stepping down to prioritise family time

articles.title: New Zealand home summer to start with blockbuster all-format India tour
articles.description: The New Zealand men's side will also host Sri Lanka for an all-format tour, while the women will host Bangladesh for three T20Is and as many ODIs

articles.title: ICC approves red-to-pink ball change to reduce bad-light impact in Test cricket
articles.description: Both teams will have to agree to changing the ball from red to pink in case of bad light during a Test match

articles.title: Tendulkar's IPL reforms: no impact player, two-part powerplay, five overs for one bowler
articles.description: What's the best way to return some semblance of balance between bat and ball at the IPL? Sachin Tendulkar has a three-part solution

articles.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi earns maiden call-up as India announce squad for England, Ireland T20Is and Asian Games 2026
articles.description: Shreyas Iyer will lead the Indian T20I team.

articles.title: ENG vs NZ 2026: 'This isn't fair balance' - Vaughan, Hussain slam Lord's pitch after Day 2
articles.description: A grand total of 33 wickets fell on the first two days.

articles.title: ILT20’s new rule mandating Afghanistan, Ireland player inclusion sparks franchise backlash
articles.description: The league has informed franchises that the rule will be compulsory from the upcoming season, despite strong objections from all six teams.

articles.title: Rohit Sharma doesn't need to prove himself, India need him in World Cup 2027: Childhood coach Dinesh Lad
articles.description: "Rohit not playing any other format does not mean he is having free time and enjoying life. He is practising every day and working constantly on his fitness," Dinesh Lad said.
